objects.prompt:
Dark Zenith Altar
Base Structure & Environment:

The Altar: A pristine, geometrically perfect obsidian platform that appears to levitate completely. The stone is pitch-black, highly reflective, and flawless, lacking the wear-and-tear of the previous tiers.

The Void: Instead of standard dungeon flooring, the ground immediately beneath and around the altar gives way to a parallax background of an endless, starry abyss, creating a sudden illusion of immense, terrifying depth.

Lighting & VFX: Three intricate, glowing purple runic circles surround the structure. These circles utilize additive blending to create a vivid, piercing neon glow that cuts through the darkness. Erratic, jagged arcs of dark magical lightning periodically strike the edges of the altar and vanish instantly.
